body_text:
The Blackwell dictionary of political science : a user's guide to its terms
Bookreader Item Preview
Share or Embed This Item
- Publication date
- 1999
- Topics
- Political science -- Dictionaries, POLITICAL SCIENCE -- Government -- General, POLITICAL SCIENCE -- Government -- National, POLITICAL SCIENCE -- Reference, POLITICAL SCIENCE -- Essays, Political science, Political Science, Law, Politics & Government, Political Science - General
- Publisher
- Oxford, UK ; Malden, Mass. : Blackwell Publishers
- Collection
- internetarchivebooks; printdisabled
- Contributor
- Internet Archive
- Language
- English
- Item Size
- 997.3M
1 online resource (384 pages)
A clear and lively introduction to the terminology of political science for students. Comprises rigorous definitions and explanations of around 1000 key terms presented in an engaging style, cross-referenced, and easiliy accessible to readers new to the subject. Includes short biographies of the most eminent writers in the discipline -- both classical (e.g. Mill) and modern (e.g. Hayek)
"Companion volume to the Blackwell dictionary of sociology by Allan Johnson"--Preface
Includes bibliographical references and index
Print version record
